name: Hellebore the Rikka Fairy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヘレボラス
desc: When your opponent activates a monster effect that targets a monster(s) you control, while you control a "Rikka" monster (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card from your hand or face-up field; negate that effect. If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 Plant monster; Special Summon this card in Defense Position, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Hellebore the Rikka Fairy" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When your opponent activates a monster effect that targets a monster(s) you control, while you control a "Rikka" monster (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card from your hand or face-up field; negate that effect. If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 Plant monster; Special Summon this card in Defense Position, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Hellebore the Rikka Fairy" once per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a monster effect that targets a monster(s) you control, while you control a "Rikka" monster (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card from your hand or face-up field; negate that effect. If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 Plant monster; Special Summon this card in Defense Position, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use each effect of "Hellebore the Rikka Fairy" once per turn.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
